Package neqsim.mcp.runners

Class CapabilitiesRunner

java.lang.Object
neqsim.mcp.runners.CapabilitiesRunner
public class CapabilitiesRunner extends Object
Capabilities discovery runner for MCP integration.

Returns a structured manifest of everything NeqSim can calculate, organized by domain. This is the entry point for external agents that need to understand what NeqSim offers before making tool calls. The manifest is static and cached — it does not require any simulation to run.

Version:
1.0
Author:
Even Solbraa

      Returns the full capabilities manifest as a JSON string.

    • getSetupTemplates

      public static String getSetupTemplates()
      Returns discoverable setup templates for major MCP workflows.
      Returns:
      JSON object keyed by setup template id

    • getSetupTemplate

      public static String getSetupTemplate(String templateId)
      Returns one setup template by id.
      Parameters:
      templateId - the setup template id
      Returns:
      JSON setup template, or an error object if the id is unknown

    • buildCapabilities

      private static String buildCapabilities()
      Builds the capabilities manifest.
      Returns:
      JSON string with all capabilities

    • buildToolCapabilities

      private static com.google.gson.JsonObject buildToolCapabilities()
      Builds machine-readable capability descriptors for every schema-backed MCP runner.
      Returns:
      object keyed by MCP tool method name

    • addAdditionalMcpToolCapabilities

      private static void addAdditionalMcpToolCapabilities(com.google.gson.JsonObject tools)
      Adds capability descriptors for MCP tools that use server-level or generic schema contracts.
      Parameters:
      tools - mutable tool capability map

    • addGenericToolCapability

      private static void addGenericToolCapability(com.google.gson.JsonObject tools, String mcpToolName, String schemaToolName, String workflowCategory, String purpose, String setupTemplateId)
      Adds a generic capability descriptor for a server-level MCP tool.
      Parameters:
      tools - mutable tool capability map
      mcpToolName - public MCP tool method name
      schemaToolName - schema catalog tool name
      workflowCategory - workflow category
      purpose - short purpose description
      setupTemplateId - setup template id

    • addToolCapability

      private static void addToolCapability(com.google.gson.JsonObject tools, String mcpToolName, String schemaToolName, String runnerClass, String workflowCategory, String purpose, List<String> requiredFields, List<String> optionalFields, List<String> supportedModels, List<String> supportedUnits, String setupTemplateId, List<String> limitations)
      Adds one capability descriptor to the map.
      Parameters:
      tools - mutable tool capability map
      mcpToolName - public MCP tool method name
      schemaToolName - schema catalog tool name
      runnerClass - runner implementation class
      workflowCategory - workflow category
      purpose - short tool purpose
      requiredFields - required input fields
      optionalFields - optional input fields
      supportedModels - supported thermodynamic models
      supportedUnits - supported or commonly used units
      setupTemplateId - setup template id
      limitations - known limitations

      private static com.google.gson.JsonObject schemaRefs(String schemaToolName)
      Builds references to available schemas for a tool.

      Returns:
      schema reference object

      Adds a setup template to the template map.
      Parameters:
      templates - mutable template map
      id - template id
      purpose - template purpose
      tools - applicable MCP tools
      steps - setup steps
      skeleton - JSON skeleton or example payload

    • addEquipmentOntology

      private static void addEquipmentOntology(com.google.gson.JsonObject equipment, String type, List<String> ports, List<String> properties, boolean dynamicSupport, List<String> variables)
      Adds equipment ontology metadata.
      Parameters:
      equipment - equipment object
      type - equipment type
      ports - outlet or stream ports
      properties - common settable properties
      dynamicSupport - whether dynamic simulation is commonly supported
      variables - common automation variables
